allow: Bash(mv .claude/skills/literature-review-common/threat_classification.md .claude/skills/literature-review/shared-schemas.md && mv .claude/skills/literature-review-light/references/finance_theory_search_heuristics.md .claude/skills/literature-review/references/ && mv .claude/skills/literature-review-light/references/threat_map_template.md .claude/skills/literature-review/references/ && mv .claude/skills/literature-review-light/SKILL.md .claude/skills/literature-review/light/ && mv .claude/skills/literature-review-targeted/SKILL.md .claude/skills/literature-review/targeted/ && mv .claude/skills/literature-review-deep/SKILL.md .claude/skills/literature-review/deep/)

Bash(echo "=== context/ \(current\) ===" && ls -1 /workspaces/ai-finance-paper/context/ 2>/dev/null; echo "=== workflow/ ===" && ls -1 /workspaces/ai-finance-paper/workflow/ 2>/dev/null; echo "=== .claude/skills/literature-review/ ===" && find /workspaces/ai-finance-paper/.claude/skills/literature-review/ -type f -name "*.md" | sort)

Bash(find .claude/agents/ .claude/skills/ workflow/ context/ -type f \\\( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" \\\) -print0 | xargs -0 sed -i \\
  -e 's|context/literature_review_post_review\\.md|context/literature/review_post_review.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/literature_constraints\\.md|context/literature/constraints.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/literature_review\\.md|context/literature/review.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/literature_notes\\.md|context/literature/notes.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/threat_map_final\\.md|context/literature/threat_map_final.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/threat_map_v1\\.md|context/literature/threat_map_v1.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/threat_map\\.md|context/literature/threat_map.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/research_plan_final\\.md|context/planning/research_plan_final.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/research_plan\\.md|context/planning/research_plan.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/search_log\\.md|context/literature/search_log.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/paper_structure\\.md|context/planning/paper_structure.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/task_queue\\.md|context/planning/task_queue.md|g' \\
  -e 's|context/novelty_claims\\.md|context/planning/novelty_claims.md|g' && echo "Bulk rename complete")
Bash(bash -n workflow/drafting/run_pipeline.sh && echo "Script syntax OK" || echo "SYNTAX ERROR")
